## Summary

Describe the change and why it is needed.

## Verification

- [ ] Frontend checked or built when frontend code changed.
- [ ] Backend tests run when backend code changed.
- [ ] Documentation updated when behavior or configuration changed.

## Compliance

- [ ] I have the right to contribute this code and assets.
- [ ] I preserved license headers, `NOTICE`, and upstream attribution.
- [ ] I did not add proprietary assets or remove required legal links.
- [ ] I did not add credentials, tokens, private keys, or production config.
- [ ] I did not add anti-tamper measures that restrict open source license rights.
